commands.purpose: Table view of attribution profiles. Filterable by tenant, subject_type, lifecycle_state, campaign (first-touch OR last-touch), source. Support tool for triage.

Verbose read of one attribution profile: base fields + first_touch snapshot + last_touch snapshot + device_snapshot + consent_snapshot + touchpoint_count + last N touchpoints + lifecycle transitions with timestamps. Redacts confidential fields (click_id / ip_hash / device UA) unless caller has attribution.view-confidential permission.

Admin CLI for backfilling attribution profiles that missed the middleware (e.g. historical signup imports from CSV). --dry-run validates the input against every observer rule without persisting. Requires --tenant + at least one of --source or --campaign.

Manually merge N anonymous attributions into an identified attribution. --into = the identified attribution_id; --from = anonymous attribution_ids to absorb. Runs the same MergeStrategy as MergeIdentifiedAttributionsJob. Enterprise-only (checked against attribution_merge entitlement).

GDPR right-to-erasure path. Redacts the attribution profile fields immediately + schedules touchpoint hard-delete 90 days out (audit hold). --force bypasses the interactive confirmation. Every fire writes to audits with 7-year retention + notifies the subject.

One-shot invocation of ReconcileAttributionCountsJob. Recomputes touchpoint_count + conversion_touchpoint_count from the actual attribution_touchpoints table. --dry-run reports drift without repair. Every finding is a data-integrity signal (should be rare).
Recomputes the campaign rollup cache from scratch. Used when the incremental rollup drifts (rare — usually a job-runner outage). window ∈ {1h, 24h, 7d, 30d}.

One-shot invocation of CampaignRollupAggregatorJob. Runs hourly on schedule; this command exists for on-demand computation (support intervention, testing). --force runs even when rollup cache is fresh.

One-shot invocation of PurgeArchivedAttributionsJob. Hard-deletes soft-deleted attribution rows past retention + touchpoints past retention (730d default, 2555d on Enterprise via attribution_touchpoint_retention_extended). --dry-run reports what would be deleted.

Compliance audit report. Lists AttributionSuppressedByConsent events in the range, aggregated by day + consent-state-summary. Feeds the compliance-team quarterly review. --format ∈ {table, csv, json}.
